name: zabir-boutiques
description: Zabir Boutiques AI Commerce Platform - Astro Hybrid Monolith on Cloudflare

scripts.deploy: npm run build:with-snapshots && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name zabir-boutiques
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0001_initial_v6_8a_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0002_indexes.sql
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0001_initial_v6_8a_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0002_indexes.sql
